source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Geist for focused research UI with Noto Sans JP guidance for dense reading, labels, and numeric rhythm.
layout: Measured 8px grids, facial-disc framing, feather-line dividers, document panels, and quiet research dashboards.

prompts.label: Transparent owl motif source
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source
Primary request: Create only an owl face and feather motif, isolated full subject, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: A focused owl facial disc with surrounding feathers, warm taupe and bark-brown plumage, amber eyes, charcoal markings, accurate feather anatomy, and crisp natural edges.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; do not crop the face, eyes, or feather silhouette.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves old-forest warmth and feather detail.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no props, no landscape, no decorative background, no second subject.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Owl" derived from the transparent owl face and feather cutout.
Reference use: The light and dark design-system boards are the reference for coding any future theme. Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from the warm taupe feathers, amber eye, charcoal markings, and old-forest browns.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board, high-resolution 4K-class source, at least 2400px wide when available.
Required visible sections: Morphous Owl, Owl, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Research Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples; use labels like Geist, Noto Sans JP, 見出し, 本文, ラベル, 数値.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command palette, sidebar navigation, research cards, dashboard charts, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style focused research system, precise grid, 8px card radius, feather-line dividers, calm old-forest document surfaces.
Color palette: use only motif-derived taupe, amber, charcoal, bark brown, forest grey, and pale feather neutrals.
Text: use short readable UI labels; avoid long paragraphs.
Constraints: no unrelated bright colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Owl".

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a dark-mode version of the visible Morphous Owl design-system board. It must feel like the same system translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference use: The light and dark design-system boards are the reference for coding any future theme. Use the transparent owl cutout and the light-mode Morphous Owl board as references. Preserve palette roles, facial-disc framing, feather texture, component language, spacing, typography, and shadcn/tweakcn coverage.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board, high-resolution 4K-class source, at least 2400px wide when available.
Required visible sections: Morphous Owl, Owl, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Research Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Visual details: dark background derived from feather charcoal and night hollow, readable text from pale taupe and down feather, primary accents from amber eye, secondary accents from warm taupe and bark brown, subtle owl feather overlays, crisp shadcn-style cards and controls.
Text: use short readable UI labels; avoid long paragraphs.
Constraints: no neon colors, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple gradients, no flat pure-black-only background, no illegible text, no random brand names.
